title: bridge-jmap email_query silently discards since_state; O(N) full scan on every poll
description: email_query() accepts a since_state parameter and documents it as for future incremental polling, but always issues a full Email/query with limit:50. As the mailbox grows, the seen_ids dedup set filters results but the server must evaluate and return up to 50 IDs every poll interval regardless. The parameter is already plumbed through the API surface — implementing Email/queryChanges would avoid the server-side full-scan cost.
